Top
  1. Home

Welcome in the LPGwebshop.com!

Autogas & Camper Gas parts

For both private customers and companies

Expertise and Service

We are the LPG Parts Expert for your Car, Camper and Caravan since 1973. Reliable & Helpful with a lot of technical knowledge. We are a Dutch company and ship your order from the Netherlands.

AEB

Alternative Fuel Electronics

For several decades, this Italian company has been a supplier of electronics for gas equipment for cars to various gas system manufacturers with the most resourceful and technological solutions. Partly because of this company, it has remained possible over the years to convert modern cars to LPG and CNG. Example products from the portfolio are ECUs, emulators and gas injectors.

Prins

Autogas Equipment

This Dutch company from Eindhoven has grown into one of the most innovative manufacturers of LPG and CNG equipment since the 1990s. Thanks to close cooperation with the Japanese brand Keihin for the injectors, it has one of the best gas systems available.

Landi Renzo

LPG and Natural Gas systems for cars

With more than 60 years of experience, this Italian company is one of the most important manufacturers of LPG / CNG equipment in the world. Over the years, the systems have evolved from simple mixer systems to multipoint injection systems to state of the art conversion systems for direct injection petrol engines. The brand also has partnerships with various automotive manufacturers such as Opel, Renault, Fiat, Alfa Romeo and Volkswagen for factory gas systems.

BRC M.T.M.

Gas Equipment

This successful Italian manufacturer of LPG and CNG equipment is a very important player in the Italian and global market for alternative fuel systems. It has been supplying a high-quality sequential gas injection system since the early 2000s, which has been further improved and updated in the years since. For example, the company has developed their own injectors, ECUs and evaporators. Several car manufacturers, such as Chevrolet and Hyundai, have chosen to include the BRC equipment as OEM in their LPG models.

AEB

Alternative Fuel Electronics

For several decades, this Italian company has been a supplier of electronics for gas equipment for cars to various gas system manufacturers with the most resourceful and technological solutions. Partly because of this company, it has remained possible over the years to convert modern cars to LPG and CNG. Example products from the portfolio are ECUs, emulators and gas injectors.

This Dutch company from Eindhoven has grown into one of the most innovative manufacturers of LPG and CNG equipment since the 1990s. Thanks to close cooperation with the Japanese brand Keihin for the injectors, it has one of the best gas systems available.

With more than 60 years of experience, this Italian company is one of the most important manufacturers of LPG / CNG equipment in the world. Over the years, the systems have evolved from simple mixer systems to multipoint injection systems to state of the art conversion systems for direct injection petrol engines. The brand also has partnerships with various automotive manufacturers such as Opel, Renault, Fiat, Alfa Romeo and Volkswagen for factory gas systems.

BRC M.T.M.

Gas Equipment

This successful Italian manufacturer of LPG and CNG equipment is a very important player in the Italian and global market for alternative fuel systems. It has been supplying a high-quality sequential gas injection system since the early 2000s, which has been further improved and updated in the years since. For example, the company has developed their own injectors, ECUs and evaporators. Several car manufacturers, such as Chevrolet and Hyundai, have chosen to include the BRC equipment as OEM in their LPG models.

For several decades, this Italian company has been a supplier of electronics for gas equipment for cars to various gas system manufacturers with the most resourceful and technological solutions. Partly because of this company, it has remained possible over the years to convert modern cars to LPG and CNG. Example products from the portfolio are ECUs, emulators and gas injectors.

                                        star star star star star

                                        Leave a review
                                        Georg Scheffel 6 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Passt alles,super Beratung im Vorfeld,top!! ?

                                        Vitaliy Tkachenko 6 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Mooi

                                        Johnny Douwma 2 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Prima geholpen

                                        Gis sig 3 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Die bestellte Gastankflasche war leider defekt, aber der Austausch und die Retoure lief reibungslos. Vielen Dank noch mal für die gute Kommunikation und die schnelle Ersatzlieferung . Den Shop kann ich wirklich vorbehaltslos empfehlen.

                                        Rudi Weyn 3 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Geweldige service, ik had op maandag een adapterset besteld om mijn lpg tank te kunnen vullen in andere landen. Dinsdag in de namiddag aangekomen maar eerst ’s avonds kunnen bekijken en de verkeerde maat geleverd hoewel ik de juiste besteld had, direct een mailtje gestuurd, woensdagmorgen een mail van LPGwebshop met excuses en dat ze onmiddellijk het juiste onderdeel gingen opsturen. 10 minuten later een bericht dat het klaarlag om door DPD op te pikken en donderdag geleverd. Iedereen kan een foutje maken, we zijn allemaal maar mensen, maar als het dan op deze manier opgelost word... geweldig, nog nooit meegemaakt met een webshop. Doe zo voort jongens, jullie zijn die 5 sterren meer dan waard. Bedankt.

                                        Pit Meiz 2 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Excellent shop, matériel de qualité, livraison rapide, personnel dynamique, à l'écoute, réponses et solutions rapides, bluffant!

                                        Jelle Plantinga 2 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Top bedrijf. Superfijn zaken doen.

                                        Evert Bekebrede 4 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Snelle levering, hoewel voor mij niet zo relevant. Hebben de artikelen die kwaliteit hebben.

                                        Berend De Boer 4 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Helemaal Top fantastische service

                                        4Feet 4Wheels 4 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        They sorted us out a refillable gas bottle for our camper as ours was leaking and we couldn’t find anywhere else in the Netherlands or Germany to get one. They also took our broken one to dispose of to save us lugging it around. Reasonably priced and saved our trip. Thanks guys!

                                        N. 4 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        What a great customer support! I hade some issues with the shipment - we know it, everyone needs their part asap - due to that I had some, I would say.. the forwarder had some IT issues and the guy from LPG Webshop always checked my order, also called me back before they are closing and; he also called when the order arrived and asked if everything is fine. I was not angry - in none of our calls, please don’t think that - and to be honest, with such a customer support and customer order handling; I couldn’t. Online shopping makes really fun if you found a shop like this and a shop like that gives me hope! Thanks a lot for your wonderful support! Greetings from Hamburg!

                                        Rogerio Nunes 5 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Rapidez na entrega, boa rede de postos de entrega, produto de qualidade a preço apetecível. Parabéns

                                        eliseo mercuri 5 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        super profescional top quality grazie!

                                        Xavier Beck 5 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Bon service rapide

                                        Aldo Pasinelli 5 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Excellent quality

                                        Stane Puntar 5 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Zelo dobri in uslužni. Pomagali pri izboru materiala. Super!

                                        Peter Graf 6 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Ich Kommuniziere über WhatsApp sehr schnell wurde wieder zurück geantwortet. Und wenn etwas nicht klar ist, wurde ich angerufen. Das ist mal ein hervorragender Händler immer wieder einfach super

                                        Sjak Zwier 6 months ago
                                        star star star star star

                                        Goede materialen en service, ook als er vragen zijn na de aankoop.

                                        Pieter van den Broek 6 months ago
                                        star star star star star_border

                                        Prima klepje, teruggekoppeld dat het plaatje andere stekkers toont dan de omschrijving (verwarrend) en dat het klepje met minder knelmoeren en ringen komt dan getoond op het plaatje.

                                        Eduardo Matias Calvo 6 months ago

                                        O valor foi dentro do normal, e relevar que a entrega foi célere e dentro dos prazos limites, foi muito bom

                                        Mooi

                                        〈
                                        〉

                                        Discounts on parcel shipments from €150,-

                                        Free Parcel Delivery for orders over €220,- to BE, NL and DE. Discounts on parcel shipments to other EU countries for orders from €150,- and even higher discounts from €250,- *
                                        Read more

                                        Delivery, Discounts & Collection

                                        Enjoy free delivery on higher order values and attractive shipping discounts within the EU. Check the conditions and options below.

                                        NL: Free Delivery

                                        Orders above €150,-

                                        BE/DE: Free Delivery

                                        Orders above €220,-

                                        EU: Shipping Discount

                                        Extra discount for > €150,- & > €250,-

                                        Free Delivery & Discounts

                                        We offer attractive free delivery and shipping discounts for higher order values. The exact conditions differ per destination country.

                                        ✅ Parcel Shipping - Free from:
                                        • Netherlands: Orders above €150,-
                                        • Belgium & Germany: Orders above €220,-
                                        Shipping Discount for other EU countries:
                                        • For orders above €150,-: Discount on parcel shipments
                                        • For orders above €250,-: Even higher discounts on parcel shipments
                                        ⚠️ Important Exceptions:
                                        • Not applicable for customers with high B2B discounts
                                        • Products heavier than 30kg can only be shipped by pallet

                                        We offer the rates for pallet shipments at a standard discount, as heavier products automatically qualify for a shipping discount due to their price.

                                        Delivery Options & Details

                                        We offer different shipping methods, depending on the weight of your order and the destination.

                                        Parcel Delivery

                                        Standard shipping for orders up to 30kg. The most chosen option for regular orders within the EU.

                                        Pallet Shipping

                                        Mandatory for products heavier than 30kg. We offer this shipping method at a standard discount.

                                        Collection

                                        Possibility to collect your order at our location. Check the full details about opening hours and conditions.

                                        Tips for Optimal Delivery:
                                        • Combine products to reach the free shipping threshold
                                        • Check product weight for heavy items (>30kg)
                                        • Review all delivery options and associated costs during checkout
                                        View Full Delivery & Collection Overview

                                        All details about rates, delivery times, conditions and collection options

                                        The highest Quality & Discounts!

                                        We are working hard everyday to keep our prices as low and discounts as high as possible for you.
                                        Read more

                                        LPG Parts shop with the best prices in Europe.

                                        Our team is working hard to get the best purchasing prices by buying in larger quantities and keeping good relations with the producers. In order to in the end to offer the best prices in our webshop.

                                        We not only have the best prices, but also guarantee to supplied only original and high quality products. In our shop you can rest assure the get the best product for the best price.

                                        B2B VAT free!

                                        As a foreign business customer (outside the Netherlands) with a valid VAT number, you can shop here VAT-free after creating an account.
                                        Read more

                                        Business Shopping - VAT-Free in the EU

                                        VAT-free shopping for business customers with a valid EU VAT number and delivery address outside the Netherlands.

                                        Account

                                        Register as a business customer

                                        VAT Number

                                        Add valid VAT number

                                        Shop Immediately

                                        VAT-free shopping & ordering

                                        VAT-Free Shopping in 4 Steps

                                        1️⃣ Create Account

                                        Create a business account via our registration page.

                                        Register Here as Business Customer
                                        2️⃣ Add Address & VAT Number

                                        Important: Add your first address to the account and provide your valid VAT number in international format:

                                        • Format: Country code + VAT number
                                        • Examples: ESA01234567 • IT01123456789 • BE0123456789 • PT0123456789
                                        • Note: Delivery address must be outside the Netherlands
                                        3️⃣ Automatic VAT Validation

                                        Your VAT number is automatically checked with the EU VIES VAT verification system.

                                        4️⃣ VAT-Free Ordering

                                        After validation, prices in the webshop are immediately VAT-free and you can place orders. Always check if prices indicate they are VAT-free.

                                        Important Information & Extras

                                        ⚠️ Important Warnings:
                                        • Account + Address required: VAT validation only works by creating an ACCOUNT + adding an ADDRESS with VAT number.
                                        • Important: The company name must match the official registration exactly.
                                        • Entering address and VAT number only during checkout does NOT work. Creating a complete account is required first.
                                        • PayPal: Even with a VAT-free account, PayPal adds VAT to payments made through their platform. Choose another payment method.
                                        Validation Problem?

                                        If your VAT number is not validated, this may have various causes (error in number, system temporarily out of service). Contact us so we can help.

                                        Your account will then be manually checked and, if possible, switched to VAT-free.

                                        Extra Business Benefits

                                        Extra discount: Regular business customers qualify for additional discount on their orders.

                                        Higher B2B discounts: After account registration, you can request even higher business discounts.

                                        Request Higher B2B Discounts

                                        After registering an account, address, and VAT number, you can request higher business discounts via the link below:

                                        Request Higher B2B Discounts

                                        Pay Your Way

                                        We offer multiple payment methods like Wero, PayPal, Google Pay, Apple Pay, SEPA, VISA, Mastcard and other National ones like, iDeal, Bancontact, Nexi, PostePay, Bancontact, Carte Blue, Multibanco, EPS, Blik, IN3.
                                        Read more

                                        Secure Payment Methods

                                        Choose from multiple secure payment options including Visa/Mastercard, PayPal, Wero, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA bank transfer, and country-specific methods.

                                        Visa/Mastercard PayPal Wero Apple Pay Google Pay SEPA Bank Transfer IN3 Afterpay Bancontact Multibanco

                                        Available Payment Methods

                                        The exact payment methods offered depend on several factors including your country, order amount, and customer type. Some payment methods are country-specific (like iDeal Wero for the Netherlands, Bancontact for Belgium, or Multibanco for Portugal), while installment payment options have specific minimum and maximum amounts.

                                        Free payment methods: Visa/Mastercard and SEPA bank transfer

                                        We cover all transaction costs for these methods

                                        Different combinations of shipping and payment methods may affect availability. For example, installment payments require delivery verification and cannot be collected from pickup points.

                                        Payment Costs & Transparency

                                        Most payment systems charge service fees in the form of percentages, fixed amounts, or combinations thereof. As a webshop, we cover these costs for selected payment methods, but for others, we must pass on a portion to maintain competitive pricing.

                                        Complete transparency: All applicable costs are clearly displayed during checkout for each payment method, showing both the percentage and exact amount before you complete your purchase.

                                        View Complete Payment Methods Guide

                                        Detailed information about costs, country availability, and security

                                        LPG Parts shop with the best prices in Europe.

                                        We are the LPG Parts Expert for your Car, Camper and Caravan since 1973. Reliable & Helpful with the necessary Technical knowledge. We are a Dutch company and ship your order from the Netherlands.

                                        Offices & Pick Up Location

                                        Ekkersrijt 3016

                                        5692CA SON

                                        The Netherlands

                                        Trusted & Secure


                                        Check out our Google reviews!

                                        • Returns & Exchanges

                                        • Downloads
                                        • FAQ

                                        • Complaints
                                        • Why does the price change?

                                        Opening Hours

                                        Mon - Thu: 9:00 - 17:00 Online Support

                                        Tue - Thu: 8:30 - 16:45 Pick up Online Orders

                                        Weekend & Holidays Closed

                                        It is not possible to order directly at the counter.
                                        First make an online order and payment.
                                        Please announce collection of online orders first.

                                        WE USE COOKIES FOR A PROPERLY ADJUSTED ENGINE OF THIS WEBSITE.

                                        This website uses its own and third-party cookies to improve our services. To give your consent to its use, press the Accept button.

                                        More information Customize Cookies

                                        Cookies configuration

                                        Customization
                                        • Third-party cookies for analytical purposes.
                                        • Show personalized recommendations based on your browsing on other sites.
                                        • Show custom campaigns on other websites.
                                        Functional (required)
                                        • Necessary to navigate this site and use its functions.
                                        • Identify you as a user and store your preferences such as language and currency.
                                        • Customize your experience based on your browsing.
                                        Shipping& Delivery

                                        Discount on Shipping from €150,- and extra discount from €250,-

                                        Safe & Trusted

                                        Webshop Trustmark Certified Member & Secured by SSL.

                                        TÜV ISO 9001

                                        Certified by TÜV Nord Netherlands

                                        Refund policy
